description: The current Socioboard PHP frontend is served by Apache2. Replace Apache2 with Nginx and PHP-FPM 7.4 (the ondrej/php repository is already configured). Configure Nginx to serve the application from /opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/public on port 80, ensuring that .php requests are handled by the php7.4-fpm Unix socket and sub-pages are correctly routed to index.php. The Nginx configuration must include the HTTP security headers X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN and X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff. Ensure Nginx and PHP-FPM are active and Apache2 is no longer binding to port 80.
